CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: give coins
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Give coins to a viewer(s)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: give karma
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Give karma to a viewer(s)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: set karma
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Set karma for a viewer

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: toggle store
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Toggle purchases on/off

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: fix all pawns
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Fixes all pawns assignments.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Clean loot boxes
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Cleans up Lootboxes. Usage: !cleanlootboxes [dry|dryrun, all, orphans]/n dry/dryrun returns count only./nOrphans fixes lootboxes that have no viewer.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: clean viwerers
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Clean viewer database. Usage: !cleanviewers [dry|noplat|all]/nUse noplat to clear users with no platform ID/nThis is safe todo.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: trait
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Looks up a trait. !trait [trait]

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Add Trait
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Adds a trait to your pawn.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Remove Trait
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Removes a trait. !removetrait [trait]

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Replace Trait
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: !replacetrait [remove trait] [add trait2]

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Set Traits
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Usage: !settraits [trait_name] [trait_name]. Add and replace traits in bulk.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Factions
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Returns a list of the factions in current game.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Colonists
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Returns the number of colonists, viewer pawns and animals.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Storyteller
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Returns the name of the current storyteller and difficulty level.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Storage
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Search for things in storage.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Shuffle Childhood
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Randomly selects a new childhood backstory.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Shuffle Childhood
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Randomly selects a new adult backstory.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Join Raid
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Joins a Twitch raid if one is active.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: check balance
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Check your coin balance

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: karma explanation
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Shows your current Karma settings in chat.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: karma explanation
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Explain what karma is

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Opens your dialy loot box!
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Explain what karma is

li.name: showDebugInfo
li.label: Show debug info in lootbox messages

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: gift coins
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: gift coins from one viewer to another viewer

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: buy
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Purchase items or pawns from the store

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: pawn
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Purchase a Pawn and join the Colony

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: use
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Use an item immediately

li.name: resetToDefaults
li.label: Reset to Defaults
li.description: Restore Max Uses Per Period to the default (0 = unlimited).

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: equip
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Equip an item to your pawn

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: wear
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Wear apparel on your pawn

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: backpack
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Add item to your pawn's inventory

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: surgery
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Purchases the implants specified and queues it for surgery on your pawn.

li.name: allowGenderSwap
li.label: Allow Gender Swap
li.description: Enable/disable the gender swap surgery option

li.name: genderSwapCost
li.label: Gender Swap Cost
li.description: Cost for gender swap surgery

li.name: allowBodyChange
li.label: Allow Body Change
li.description: Enable/disable body type change surgeries (fat, thin, hulking, etc.)

li.name: bodyChangeCost
li.label: Body Change Cost
li.description: Cost for body type change surgeries

li.name: allowSterilize
li.label: Allow Sterilize
li.description: Enable/disable sterilization (tubal ligation / vasectomy)

li.name: sterilizeCost
li.label: Sterilize Cost
li.description: Cost for sterilization procedures

li.name: allowIUD
li.label: Allow IUD
li.description: Enable/disable IUD implant and removal

li.name: iudCost
li.label: IUD Cost
li.description: Cost for IUD implant (removal is half)

li.name: allowVasReverse
li.label: Allow Vas Reverse
li.description: Enable/disable vasectomy reversal

li.name: vasReverseCost
li.label: Vas Reverse Cost
li.description: Cost for vasectomy reversal

li.name: allowTerminate
li.label: Allow Terminate
li.description: Enable/disable pregnancy termination

li.name: terminateCost
li.label: Terminate Cost
li.description: Cost for pregnancy termination

li.name: allowHemogen
li.label: Allow Hemogen
li.description: Enable/disable hemogen extraction

li.name: hemogenCost
li.label: Hemogen Cost
li.description: Cost (negative = viewer is paid) for hemogen extraction

li.name: allowTransfusion
li.label: Allow Transfusion
li.description: Enable/disable blood transfusion

li.name: transfusionCost
li.label: Transfusion Cost
li.description: Cost for blood transfusion

li.name: allowMiscBiotech
li.label: Allow Misc Biotech
li.description: Enable/disable other biotech/misc surgery options

li.name: miscBiotechCost
li.label: Misc Biotech Cost
li.description: Default cost for other biotech surgeries

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Event Command
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Usage: !event <event_name> or !lookup event <name>

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: weather
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Usage: !weather <type>. Types: rain, snow, fog, thunderstorm, clear, etc.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: militaryaid
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Call for military reinforcements from friendly factions

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: raid
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Call a hostile raid on the colony

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: raid info
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Show information about available raid types

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: purchase list
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: List available items for purchase

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: price check
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Exact price of an item.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: instructions
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Show how to use the mod

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: all commands
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: List all available commands

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: lookup
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Search store items, game events, weather, or traits with prices. Use: !lookup [type] <name>. Types: item, event, weather, trait

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: research
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: List Research

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: study
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: List anomaly studies

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: mod info
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Shows karma and coin earning rates

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: mod settings
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Shows karma and coin earning rates

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: wealth
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Shows Wealth of Colony.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: my pawn
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Show information about your pawn

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: Leave
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Release your assigned pawn

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: rescue me
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Request recovery of your vanished pawn. Captured/kidnapped creates a world rescue site; left-behind drop-pods home. Dead pawns use !revivepawn.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: revive pawn
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Revives a pawn selected all or viewers

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: heal pawn
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Heals pawn injuries - self, specific user, or all pawns with optional quantity

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: dye
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Dyes your clothing.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: setfavoritecolor
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Sets your pawn's favorite color.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: passion
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Place a wager to have chance to increase a passion.

li.name: minPassionWager
li.label: Min wager:
li.description: Lowest number of coins a viewer can wager on !passion (default: 500)

li.name: maxPassionWager
li.label: Max wager:
li.description: Highest number of coins allowed in a single !passion wager (default: 1000)

li.name: passionWagerBonusPer100
li.label: Bonus % per 100 coins wagered
li.description: How many % success chance is added for every 100 coins wagered (default: 1.0)

li.name: maxPassionWagerBonus
li.label: Maximum bonus from wager
li.description: Maximum bonus percentage that can come from large wagers (default: 30%)

li.name: basePassionSuccessChance
li.label: Base success chance (%):
li.description: Starting success chance before any wager bonus (default: 15%)

li.name: maxPassionSuccessChance
li.label: Max success chance (%):
li.description: Hard upper limit on total success chance, even with big wagers (default: 60%)

li.name: criticalSuccessRatio
li.label: Critical success multiplier (of base chance)
li.description: Critical success chance = base success \u00d7 this value (default: 0.2)

li.name: maxCriticalSuccessChance
li.label: Hard cap on critical success chance (%)
li.description: Absolute maximum chance for a critical success outcome (default: 5%)

li.name: criticalFailBaseChance
li.label: Base critical failure chance (%)
li.description: Starting critical failure chance before reduction (default: 10%)

li.name: criticalFailReductionFactor
li.label: Crit-fail reduction per success chance point
li.description: How much the crit-fail chance decreases for each % of base success (default: 0.1)

li.name: minCriticalFailChance
li.label: Minimum critical failure chance (%)
li.description: Lowest the critical failure chance can ever go (default: 2%)

li.name: critSuccessUpgradeVsNewChance
li.label: Chance to upgrade existing passion (vs gain new) on crit success
li.description: Probability to upgrade an existing passion instead of adding a new one on critical success (default: 0.5)

li.name: critFailLoseVsWrongChance
li.label: Chance to lose passion (vs gain useless one) on crit failure
li.description: Probability to lose an existing passion instead of gaining a useless one on critical failure (default: 0.6)

li.name: targetedCritFailAffectTargetChance
li.label: Chance targeted skill is affected (vs random other) on targeted crit failure
li.description: When using !passion [skill] \u2014 chance the targeted skill is affected on crit failure (default: 0.7)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: races
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: List all available races.

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: xenotypes
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: List all available xenotypes by race. !xenotype [race]

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: join queue
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Join the pawn queue

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: leave queue
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Leave the pawn queue

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: queue status
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Check your position in the pawn queue

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: accept pawn
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Accept a pawn offer

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: chitchat
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Have your pawn chat with another colonist (Cost: 10 coins)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: deep talk
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Have your pawn have a deep conversation (Cost: 15 coins)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: insult
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Insult another colonist (Cost: 5 coins, requires 5 karma)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: flirt
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Flirt with another colonist (Cost: 20 coins)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: reassure
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Reassure another colonist (Requires Ideology DLC, Cost: 12 coins)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: nuzzle
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Nuzzle with another colonist (Cost: 8 coins)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: animal chat
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Chat with an animal (Cost: 10 coins)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: marriage proposal
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Propose marriage to another colonist (Cost: 50 coins, requires 10 karma)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: build rapport
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Build rapport with another colonist (Cost: 25 coins)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: convert ideology
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: Attempt to convert another colonist to your ideology (Requires Ideology DLC, Cost: 30 coins, requires 15 karma)

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: hello world
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: A simple test command

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: hello world
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: CaptoLamia's test command

CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.label: AI Chatbot
CAP_ChatInteractive.ChatCommandDef.commandDescription: !!!DO NOT TURN THIS ON!!!Talk to the AI storyteller . Requires AIChatBotActive in settings.
